My First Post

por Daniel H. Morales J.
~1 minuto(s) de lectura 13-02-2023

Ampère’s circuital law (with Maxwell’s addition)

\[\oint_{a x} \mathbf{B} \cdot d \ell=\mu_0\left(\iint_z \mathrm{~J} \cdot \mathrm{d} z+\varepsilon_0 \frac{\mathrm{d}}{d t} \iint_z \mathbf{E} \cdot \mathrm{dS}\right)\]
